# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    S = data[1]

    result = 0
    current_nand = 0  # Start with A_i for i = 1

    for i in range(N):
        # Compute f(i+1, j) for all j >= i+1
        # Start with A_i+1
        current_nand = int(S[i])
        # For each j >= i+1, compute f(i+1, j)
        # We can track the current_nand as we extend the subarray
        for j in range(i, N):
            if j == i:
                # f(i+1, i+1) = A_i+1
                result += current_nand
            else:
                # f(i+1, j) = f(i+1, j-1) NAND A_j
                current_nand = 1 if (current_nand == 0 or current_nand == 1 and int(S[j]) == 0) else 0
                result += current_nand

    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
